stimulus_shape: drought vs flurry: a newcomer after a long confirmation stretch vs the same newcomer after a flurry of newcomers, standing mass and line-surface matched; control re-confirms an incumbent at the test line
difficulty: intermediate — the constant reserve is a strong live baseline (full Bayesian-surprise channel) yet blind to the novelty rate; a small signal-derived amplitude moves the needle
novelty: high — reserve-as-recent-rate was not in the corpus; the existing reserve is a fixed literal
mechanism: feed the Born reserve the γ-decayed first-appearance mass ν (ν′=γ·ν+newcomerMass) instead of the constant 1.0, through the unchanged Born step
fix_layer: interior (core/surprise.js exposes noveltyNext; perceiver/reading.js threads it under opts.signalReserve, parity-gated)
scope: holds for any reading with newcomers vs a non-trivial prior (text proposition basis + tonal pitch basis); inert by design on pure-confirmation readings

target: REC (the decay term of the reserve recurrence)
stimulus_shape: stale flurry: newcomers early, then a long confirmation stretch, then a newcomer — recent context is confirmation
novelty: medium — isolates which term of PR-0001 is load-bearing
verdict: CONFIRMED — the decay term is load-bearing
mechanism: without γ the reserve would track a cumulative count, not the RECENT rate; a stale flurry would wrongly under-surprise its newcomer
scope: stale-flurry newcomer surprises 0.64 vs fresh-flurry 0.12 — 5× — because ν decayed back down

stimulus_shape: drought-vs-flurry across independent casts, drought lengths {4,6,8}, and γ horizons {0.5,0.7,0.9}
novelty: medium — re-runs PR-0001's shape on fresh content to test generalization, not a new shape
verdict: GENERAL — 9/9 independent cases split under ON, 9/9 blind under OFF
scope: split magnitude scales with drought length and 1/γ, as expected

stimulus_shape: same drought-vs-flurry, read on the surprisal channel rather than the Bayesian channel
site: src/perceiver/reading.js pNovel = NOVELTY / Z (the −log p novelty reserve)
novelty: high — the SAME constant smell in a different (surface) channel
verdict: LOCATED, not closed — surprisal(drought)==surprisal(flurry)=1.98 (blind), a candidate for the same signal-derived fix in a later cycle
mechanism: would mirror PR-0001 on the −log p channel's reserve
scope: open pressure for a future cycle

stimulus_shape: not yet built — the draw (generation from p(next)) reserves the same constant
novelty: high — the generation-side twin of PR-0001
verdict: LOCATED, not closed — forwardDist's reserve is the same literal; the draw's openness should track the recent novelty rate too
mechanism: thread ν into forwardDist's reserve as well
scope: open pressure for a future cycle (generation, docs/spec-generation.md)

stimulus_shape: a reading with no newcomers at all (pure confirmation)
verdict: FLAT (by design) — with no newcomers the reserve is never drawn, ON==OFF everywhere; not an edge to climb. Stop generating near here.
mechanism: correct inertness — the absence of the phenomenon, not a failure
scope: records the flat region so exploration is not wasted here
